title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 4th June 2026 || TV5 Money

recommendations.note: High-conviction; buy partial now instead of waiting for lower level
recommendations.detail: In stocks with strong conviction, buy about 25% upfront rather than insisting on an exact entry level. The awaited 1100 never came; it is already at ~1400. Start buying some now and add in staggered fashion.

recommendations.note: Best-in-class medical equipment but turned speculative near 52-week low
recommendations.detail: One of the best in medical equipment; corrected from ~2300 with decent results (growth maintained) and is now debt-free. But it became a speculative counter at 89 PE near its 52-week low with no buying coming in. Hold; if it rallies to 510-520, exit.

recommendations.note: Not a great stock; hold existing position
recommendations.detail: Grouped with Ramky as 'not very great stocks.' Advised holding the existing holding rather than acting.

recommendations.note: Not a great stock; hold existing position
recommendations.detail: Grouped with Protean as 'not very great stocks.' Advised holding the existing holding rather than acting.

recommendations.note: Smart-meter story; expect only steady returns
recommendations.detail: A smart, better story that has consolidated and trades steadily around 300, with good-enough results. Only steady returns expected from here; could attempt 400 again if the smart-meter revolution continues. (Originally suggested near 78; it ran to 500-600.)

recommendations.note: Hold if already bought; no fresh buying
recommendations.detail: Company is doing well overall, but watch whether the regulatory framework for solar panels changes and how quickly government changes come. Hold for now if already bought; no fresh buying.

recommendations.note: Only ever a 'dark horse' on volumes, never a recommendation; tainted group
recommendations.detail: This was never an investment recommendation, only a 'dark horse' mention when volumes appeared. The promoter group is tainted (a sitting MLA and former MP-minister). Be very careful with such counters and do not go near them.
Overpriced since listing (a 'Lokesh-type', Gujju-batch-operated counter) with heavy distribution at 1300-1200. Exit on rallies around 675-700. A reasonable buy price for the company would be 360-400.

recommendations.note: Milk prices rising, ice-cream season strong
recommendations.detail: Milk prices are jumping and the ice-cream season is running well, so accumulate at this rate (~322). Patience is needed; some slow results improvement may be seen next quarter.

recommendations.note: Attractive valuations; needs to hold 530-540 for sustained interest
recommendations.detail: No fresh news, but attractive valuations bring intermittent buying. For sustained interest it must hold above 530-540 for two-three days. Accumulate continuously whenever the stock is below 500.
